name: Schliff
tagline: Improve your Claude Code skills automatically — measurable quality, overnight iteration
description: Takes any Claude Code skill as input and iteratively improves it with measurable metrics across 6 dimensions: structure, trigger accuracy, output quality, edge-case coverage, token efficiency, and composability. The agent-assisted loop makes one atomic change per iteration, keeps improvements, auto-reverts regressions, and logs everything. Based on Karpathy's autoresearch loop pattern. Requires: python3, bash, git.
